questions.question: 7 (a) Select two processes that show a chemical change. Tick (3) two boxes. boiling water burning methane dissolving salt mixing ink and water rusting of iron [2] (b) The reaction of hydrogen with nitrogen is a reversible reaction. Write the symbol that shows a reversible reaction. ..................................................................

parts.answer: ⇌ May/June 2025 Question Answer Marks H2 (1) reactants on left hand line and products on right hand line on the graph (1) Question Answer Marks sedimentation – to remove solids chlorination – to kill microbes all 3 correct = 2 marks 1 correct = 1 mark pure water melts at 0 °C / has a sharp melting point / if not 0°C then it must be impure. OR impure water melts at a lower mp than 0 °C / melts over a range of temperatures OR compare the melting point of the water sample to the mp of pure water. particulates: respiratory problems / cancer (1) May/June 2025 Question Answer Marks neutralisation (1)
